creator: brunolauze@msn.com
text:
Comiling GENERIC kernel with at least :

options  ZFS
device   crypto


brings deflate.c filename conflict.

Fix: rename sys/opencrypto/deflate.c to sys/opencrypto/cryptodeflate.c

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: 
Compile Kernel with "options ZFS" and "device crypto" together.
